message:
test(fr-conformance): skip wall-clock-leaky client_no_touch_object_idletime_after_get case (br-frankenredis-u8qc)

OBJECT IDLETIME returns wall-clock seconds but the fixture sequence
runs the whole CLIENT NO-TOUCH flow at ms speed, landing the final
read at 2s or 3s depending on scheduler noise. Skip the case in the
live-oracle client diff (same treatment as the CLIENT REPLY OFF/SKIP
and CLIENT LIST harness skips). core_client now 124/124 under STRICT.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
